race.comment: TUESDAY (8) has been racing in excellent form and rarely runs a poor race. With a favourable draw and an extra 100m to travel, she looms as an each-way threat again. TAKUNAI (2) is a durable veteran who continues to perform well without winning, and another honest effort is expected. A 3kg claim will help him, and with some luck off a tricky gate, he can figure in the finish. DON'T STOP ME NOW (9) improved fresh and has top 4 claims again second-up. Include in all combinations to be safe. PEACH GALANTES (13) best of the rest.
